title: soranthe lanata
intro: Soranthe lanata, also known as the hairy soranthe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of soranthe lanata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
